creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
laszlof     2006-12-04 16:00:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science/cdo          Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/cdo/files    extra-patch-freebsd5-pthread 
  Log:
  Fix build on 5.x.
  
  pthread_condattr_getpshared() and pthread_mutexattr_getpshared() were not introduced to FreeBSD 5.
  
  PR:             ports/106289
  Submitted by:   Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh <sunpoet@sunpoet.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +7 -1      ports/science/cdo/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/science/cdo/files/extra-patch-freebsd5-pthread (new)
